name: TDECU Fort Worth
description_short: TDECU Fort Worth is a not-for-profit credit union member center offering lobby and drive-thru banking, ATMs, wire transfers, and notary services.
description_long:
TDECU (Teachers Employees Credit Union) operates as a not-for-profit financial cooperative with over $4.9 billion in assets and 399,000+ members across Texas. The Fort Worth location at 4312 Town Center Drive serves as one of 30+ member centers throughout the state, providing comprehensive banking services to both individual consumers and small business owners. Founded on cooperative principles, TDECU distinguishes itself by prioritizing member value over profit extraction, reinvesting surplus back into member benefits and competitive rates.

The Fort Worth branch offers a full suite of banking services including deposit-taking ATMs, coin-counting, wire transfers (domestic and international), money orders, notary services, debit card replacement, cash advances, and drive-thru banking. Members can schedule appointments with financial guidance specialists and access member care support Monday-Sunday from 8:00 am to 8:00 pm at (800) 839-1154. Business and commercial services are available for small business owners seeking growth-oriented financial solutions. The location features both lobby hours (9:00 AM–5:00 PM weekdays) and extended drive-thru hours (until 6:00 PM on Fridays), with 24/7 ATM access.

TDECU distinguishes itself through its not-for-profit cooperative structure, which eliminates profit-driven incentives and aligns the institution's interests with members. The network of 55,000+ surcharge-free ATMs provides exceptional ATM access compared to traditional banking competitors. The emphasis on personalized member guidance and the availability of notary services, coin-counting, and business banking distinguish TDECU from larger impersonal banking institutions. The cooperative model and community focus position TDECU as member-centric rather than shareholder-driven.

For consumers seeking traditional banking with a cooperative advantage, TDECU Fort Worth delivers solid execution. However, the location operates standard business hours with weekend closures, and the website provides limited detail on deposit products, interest rates, loan terms, or competitive advantages versus other credit unions. Membership eligibility requirements are not disclosed on this page. The branch serves a specific geographic area, and those outside Fort Worth must visit other member centers or rely on digital banking and the broader ATM network. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Access to 55,000+ surcharge-free ATMs nationwide as a TDECU member
Not-for-profit cooperative structure means profits are reinvested in member benefits, not shareholders
24/7 ATM availability at the Fort Worth location despite limited lobby hours
Drive-thru banking with extended Friday hours (until 6:00 PM) for working professionals
Notary services available by appointment at all locations
Wire transfer capabilities for both domestic and international transfers
Member care support available 7 days a week (8:00 am–8:00 pm) at (800) 839-1154
Business and commercial banking services designed for small business growth
cons: Limited weekend access: branch closed Saturday and Sunday except by appointment
Standard business hours (9:00 AM–5:00 PM weekdays) may be inconvenient for some workers; only Friday extends to 6:00 PM
Website provides no information on deposit account rates, loan rates, or membership eligibility requirements
No indication of whether this location offers all services available at other TDECU branches
Membership requirements not disclosed on local branch page; may require specific employment or organizational affiliation
best_for: Educators and employees of eligible organizations seeking member-owned banking with cooperative benefits
Consumers with access to multiple surcharge-free ATM networks who value not-for-profit alignment
Small business owners needing flexible business banking with local relationship management
Fort Worth residents and workers seeking convenient drive-thru and lobby banking during business hours
diagnosis: TDECU Fort Worth is best for educators, employees of participating organizations, and consumers who value not-for-profit cooperative banking with extensive ATM access and personalized service. The main caveat is that membership eligibility may be restricted to specific employee groups or organizations, and this local branch page does not disclose rates, terms, or full eligibility criteria—prospective members should contact (800) 839-1154 or visit tdecu.org to confirm membership eligibility and compare product offerings.
services: Drive-thru banking (9:00 AM–5:00 PM weekdays; 9:00 AM–6:00 PM Friday)
Cash advances (with credit or debit card)
Member financial guidance and appointment scheduling
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 4312 Town Center Dr, Fort Worth, TX 76115
